title: Ligularia sagitta
uses: Ligularia sagitta is a plant with reported medicinal uses in traditional Chinese medicine. It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and roots are commonly used to prepare teas and infusions for medicinal purposes. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Ligularia sagitta as a medicinal plant.
